title: verbascum undulatum
intro: Verbascum undulatum, also known as the wavy mullein or wavy-leaved mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which are derived from its leaves, flowers, and roots. The health benefits of Verbascum undulatum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used topically as a cream or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
